_comment: Evaluation queries over corpus.md. RELEVANCE ORACLE: a retrieved chunk is 'relevant' to a query if its text contains the query's answer_contains string (case-insensitive). This keeps recall@k grading independent of the chunking strategy. gold_section is the human-readable correct section. 'illustrates' tags which technique each query is designed to show off. Q1-Q7 are the clean retrieval set used by ex2/ex3/ex4; Q8-Q9 are used by ex5 (reranking / contextual retrieval).

queries.query: What did the software engineering team ship this year?
How did the company respond to the 2023 security breach?
What did the company do to keep employees from leaving?
How much did annual recurring revenue grow?
How quickly does support respond to customers now?
What did the team change after the phishing attack?
queries.illustrates: reranking (the word 'team' and 'change' are generic; intent points at incident response)

queries.query: Who was issued hardware security keys?
queries.illustrates: contextual retrieval (the answer sentence loses its section when chunked)
